claudeResult.resultText: The dashboard is rendered on the canvas. Open http://localhost:7812/?session=421dc035-3ed4-4b64-bd56-193d8e06a515 to view it — I couldn't snapshot to visually verify since no browser tab is connected yet, but the spec built successfully with the KPI row (Pass Rate 94%, Avg Build Time 4m12s, Open Incidents 2) plus the bar chart of build durations and line chart of deploy counts side by side.
